message:
Remove tokio runtime dependency from workspace manifest

Asupersync provides its own async runtime; the tokio dependency was
introduced as an accidental addition and conflicts with the WASM
browser compilation target where tokio's native runtime is forbidden.
Removing it ensures the dependency closure stays clean for the
wasm32-unknown-unknown target.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
